public.secureRegistration: Secure registration powered by your provider
public.sessionsOpenSoon: When sessions open for each site, you'll see them listed below — with dates, locations, and registration. Use the address search above to sort by driving distance from your home once events are posted.
public.bookmarkHint: Bookmark this page and check back. Questions? Use the links your district or provider shared.
public.noSignups: We are not accepting new sign-ups on this page at the moment. New sessions are added here as soon as they open.

public.enterYourAddressHeading: Enter your address to see which event is closest to your home

public.nearestSubtextHub: We use Google Maps driving routes to sort programs by shortest drive to each listed site or venue.
public.nearestSubtextGeneral: We use Google Maps driving routes to each in-person venue and sort events by shortest drive.

checker.title: Who is checking in?

checker.heading: Who is checking in {name}?
checker.tapYourName: Tap your name. Guardians can update child information on the following steps.
checker.iConfirm: I confirm that I am {name} and I am authorized to update this child's information.
checker.asGuardianNote: As the account guardian, you can update emergency contacts, walk-home authorization, and other details on the following steps.

photoPreference.heading: Pickup verification photos
photoPreference.desc: Set your photo preferences for {name}'s pickups. Photos are taken with the front-facing camera, encrypted, and saved securely. You can update these any time by contacting staff.

emergency.heading: Emergency contacts
emergency.signInToEdit: Sign in as the account guardian to add or update emergency contacts.

pickup.heading: Authorized drivers & pickups
pickup.reviewToday: Review who may pick up {name} today.
pickup.noneOnFile: No authorized pickup people on file yet.
pickup.linkGuardianRequired: A linked guardian is required to add or change this — staff can help.

walkHome.heading: Walk-home authorization
walkHome.notAuthorized: Not authorized to walk home alone from this program.
walkHome.signInToEdit: Sign in as the account guardian to update walk-home authorization.

allergies.heading: Allergies & approved snacks
allergies.noInfo: No allergy or snack information on file.
allergies.doNotGiveSnacks: Do not give snacks to this child.
allergies.signInToEdit: A linked guardian is required to add or change this — staff can help.
allergies.confirmCorrect: Allergies and snack information above is correct.

waiver.iHaveRead: I have read this section and consent to sign.
waiver.iIntend: I intend my electronic signature to have the same effect as a handwritten signature.

sibling.checkinSub: Tap Check in to use the same guardian info — or tap Edit info to go through the full check-in for that child.
sibling.checkoutSub: Tap a child to release them to the same person using the same signature{photo}.
sibling.samePickup: Released to {name} — other children are still checked in.

removeCheckin.title: Remove check-in?
removeCheckin.desc: You are about to remove the check-in for {name}. A staff member must confirm by typing their full name exactly as it appears in the system.
